subcodes.title: Words spoken at Baltimore Hotel in Paris, 1913-05-22
subcodes.first_line: There are three kinds of light. The light of the sun has only one function and that is to make things manifest.... The second light is the light of the eye... The third light is the light of the intellect.
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism of color and light, @intelligible vs. perceptible realities, @ether; the phenomenon of light, @mind as intermediary between soul and body, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture
